scan_output: Vulnerability sysctl_net_ipv4_conf_default_rp_filter not found in single-rule scan (possibly fixed)

llm_verdict.message:
### Verification

`/etc/sysctl.d/90-rp_filter.conf` now contains:
```
net.ipv4.conf.default.rp_filter = 1
```

The kernel parameter is also set at runtime (`sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.default.rp_filter=1`), ensuring the change is active immediately and will persist across reboots. The system is now compliant with the OpenSCAP requirement.

reasoning_messages.content:
### Verification

`/etc/sysctl.d/90-rp_filter.conf` now contains:
```
net.ipv4.conf.default.rp_filter = 1
```

The kernel parameter is also set at runtime (`sysctl -w net.ipv4.conf.default.rp_filter=1`), ensuring the change is active immediately and will persist across reboots. The system is now compliant with the OpenSCAP requirement.
